why_it_matters: An unreconciled statin leaves the medication list incomplete and, in comfort-focused hospice care, statins are often candidates for deprescribing—so it should be documented to guide that decision and flag interaction potential with her opioids.
A concrete two-day nursing follow-up defines the initial monitoring interval for pain and bowel function and should be documented to ensure continuity of the care plan.
Referencing that an H&P was documented is administrative housekeeping that does not change clinical management of this visit.
